General.Name: Success Universe Group Ltd
General.Description: Success Universe Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the travel-related and property investment businesses in Hong Kong, Macau, the People's Republic of China, and North America. It provides travel-related and administration services; and wholesale and retails airline tickets and tour packages. The company also leases office premises and sells properties. In addition, it manages Ponte 16, an integrated casino-entertainment resort in Macau. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Hong Kong. Success Universe Group Limited is a subsidiary of Silver Rich Macau Development Limited.
